highlights.text: On Tuesday at 4pm, I specified higher targets: “My general lean is can head back up to 6925 range resistance.
One of those cycles is ES goes elevator down in a vertical flush cutting through every support.
I wrote on Monday at 4pm: “The only possible option here would be a Failed Breakdown of Monday’s daily low which is at 6832 now.
Today - after that monster rally - it was finally time to retrace and ES went elevator down this morning 100 points basically down to 6867-70.
As always though, this elevator down sell would resolve in a short squeeze.
Also watch Failed Breakdown of the 6892 evening low last night.” We saw exactly this today, holding 6870 , recovering 6892, and popping.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll go over today’s Failed Breakdowns (these are key to know), and I’ll discuss the actionable plan for tomorrow.

post_title: SPX Finally Pulls Back Today, and Bulls Bought It. Can It Stick Though? Feb 27 Plan
